Careers at Westcoast Smile | Join Our Dental Team
Home  Careers
CURRENT OPPORTUNITY

At Westcoast Smile Dental Vancouver, we are committed to providing our patients with a unique experience in dental and oral wellness. Our goal is to provide aesthetic, functional and biocompatible cosmetic dentistry of the highest technical and artistic standards in a reassuring, comforting and safe environment. We believe in empowering our team members to strive for excellence and offer an environment for growth and success.

Certified Dental Assistant (CDA)
We’re Hiring: Certified Dental Assistant (CDA)

Location: Kitsilano, Vancouver, BC

Are you a Certified Dental Assistant looking for a positive, supportive, and modern workplace?
Join Westcoast Smile, a boutique-style dental practice known for its welcoming team, loyal patients, and stunning location in the heart of Kitsilano.

We’re proud to offer:

A beautiful, well-designed office environment with a boutique feel

Above-average compensation and competitive benefits

A collaborative team that genuinely enjoys working together

Paperless, digital systems for an efficient workflow

ABELDent software – we’re happy to provide training if you’re new to it

At Westcoast Smile, we believe in creating an environment where both patients and team members feel valued and supported. Whether you’re actively searching or simply exploring new opportunities, we welcome you to stop by —
